name: Verify "Shopping Cart by Shopify" link is displayed in the footer bottom bar

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
Then  I should see the link "Shopping Cart by Shopify" in the footer bottom bar

labels.name: story
labels.value: Verify "Shopping Cart by Shopify" link is displayed in the footer bottom bar
